description: Capture reproducible CATES measurement evidence and calculate clearly labeled token-budget projections.
model: GPT-5.5 (copilot)

# Measure CATES Token Budgets

## Objective

Create reproducible baseline evidence using one canonical tokenizer and keep
planning projections separate from observed runtime usage.

## Required Steps

1. Read `cates-exercises/03-cates-measurement-token-budgets.md`.
2. Analyze only the isolated sample repository with `openai-cl100k`.
3. Save JSON output to `reports/03-baseline.json`.
4. Compare `openai-cl100k`, `openai-o200k`, and `anthropic-claude` without
   changing the canonical baseline.
5. Record repository state, standard version, analyzer commit, tokenizer,
   always-loaded tokens, total tokens, assumptions, score, and conformance.
6. Calculate the reference monthly-load projection using 50 daily invocations,
   22 workdays, conditional probability `0.3`, and on-demand probability `0.05`.

## Output

Label token counts as measurements and monthly values as projections. Do not
convert projections to currency unless a current model-specific price is
provided by the user.

## Validation

Parse the saved JSON and confirm the analyzer commit and tokenizer are stated in
the summary.
